summary: Phase E — Readiness checklist endpoint + editor UI panel validated end-to-end. Backend: 10/10 pytest PASS on /app/backend/tests/test_phoneme_phase_e.py covering (1) u-foot 100/100 ready=true with all 15 expected check keys present and status='pass', (2) i-fleece Height=Close & Backness=Front parity checks pass, (3) 404 with 'non trovato' on nonexistent-id, (4) 401/403 on no-auth, (5) contradiction detection — direct mongo mutation of features.Height→Open + classification[0].label→Near-high correctly flags parity.height=fail (msg contains 'Near-close' AND 'Open') and enum.classification=fail (msg contains 'Near-high'), score<100, ready=false, (6) contrast.self detection — direct mongo change of Contrast feature to '/x/ vs /y/: nonsense' correctly flags contrast.self=fail with card ipa 'ʊ' in the message, (7) Regression: canonical still 84 items, u-foot public frequencyChart still 9 bars, autofill /ʊ/ GenAm still works, (8) Cleanup verification — u-foot final state confirmed clean (score=100, ready=true, summary={pass:15,warn:0,fail:0,total:15}) via both pytest fixture teardown and direct API call after tests. Frontend: /admin/phonemes/u-foot loads and auto-fetches readiness. editor-readiness-score shows '100/100', editor-readiness-verdict shows '✓ Pronta per pubblicazione', editor-readiness-list has exactly 15 children each with data-testid starting 'editor-readiness-item-' (verified samples: editor-readiness-item-canonical-match, editor-readiness-item-parity-height, etc). editor-readiness-refresh-btn click re-fetches and list re-renders with same 15 items. Section is defaultOpen (score/verdict/list visible without clicking to expand). On /admin/phonemes/new: editor-readiness-score and editor-readiness-list are absent; refresh button is disabled; message 'Salva la scheda per abilitare il check di readiness' visible.

minor.issue: Seed data drift — i-fleece has features Rounding='Unrounded (spread)' but canonical says 'Unrounded'. Result: parity.rounding = fail, score=93, ready=false. Spec expected ready=true for i-fleece. Fix: seed / DB card should store 'Unrounded' (canonical value) OR the readiness check should normalise ' (spread)' etc parenthetical qualifiers. Recommend fixing the seed since 'Unrounded (spread)' also fails Phase B vocabulary lockdown for consistency.

action_items: Fix i-fleece seed drift: features Rounding='Unrounded (spread)' → 'Unrounded' (or add a normalisation step in build_readiness_report that strips parenthetical qualifiers before comparison). This is the only data-level issue found; u-foot is 100% ready.
critical_code_review_comments: phoneme_cards.py build_readiness_report parity comparisons use lowercase equality — good, but does not normalise trailing parenthetical qualifiers ('Unrounded (spread)' vs 'Unrounded'). Consider either (a) stripping '(...)' before compare, or (b) making the seed rigorously match canonical values. Currently causes false-positive fail for i-fleece.

phoneme_cards.py _CONTRAST_RE regex captures the IPA between slashes but the presence-check only verifies the OTHER symbol exists in canonical for one dialect (breaks on first hit). If u-foot has Contrast '/ʊ/ vs /uː/' and only GenAm has /uː/ but declared dialects include RP, contrast.pair still passes. This is fine but the pass message only mentions 'canonical' generically — worth noting the dialect where the match was found.

phoneme_cards.py minimal_pairs.count heuristic uses `abs(len(a) - len(b)) > 3` as bad-pair filter — a fine proxy but rejects e.g. 'a/aaaa' silently. Acceptable heuristic for admin nudging; not blocking.

phoneme_cards.py content.audio check: entry is 'audio present' if ANY value in the dialect dict is a non-empty string/list — this passes for {'isolated':'','examples':['x']} correctly, but also passes for {'notes':'todo'} if such a key ever slipped in. Consider whitelisting keys (isolated, examples) for stricter validation.

PhonemeAdminEditorPage.jsx fetchReadiness auto-fires on routeId change but not after Save — an admin who fixes a fail and saves must click Ricalcola to see the updated score. Enhancement: auto-refetch after successful save (or debounced after edit) would tighten the feedback loop.

PhonemeAdminEditorPage.jsx readiness list items use `c.key.replace(/\./g, '-')` for data-testid — safe. The list has no header/legend — a small 'legenda: ✓ pass ⚠ warn ✗ fail' would help newer editors. Not blocking.
seed_data_creation: None persistent. Contradiction tests directly write to Mongo (features/classification) and revert via pytest fixture teardown (replace_one with full snapshot). Post-test verification confirms u-foot is back to score=100, ready=true, summary={pass:15,warn:0,fail:0,total:15}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase E readiness endpoint stable. Regression suite now: test_canonical_phonemes.py (27) + test_phoneme_phase_b.py (14) + test_phoneme_phase_c.py (8) + test_phoneme_phase_d.py (16) + test_phoneme_phase_e.py (10) = 75-test phoneme CMS regression. The i-fleece Rounding='Unrounded (spread)' drift is a KNOWN pre-existing seed issue (not introduced by Phase E) — the readiness check correctly flags it. Once fixed, uncomment `assert data['ready'] is True` in test_ifleece_readiness_pass. Cleanup discipline: any Mongo direct-write in future readiness contradiction tests MUST use the ufoot_snapshot fixture pattern (full-doc replace_one on teardown) to guarantee restore even on assertion failure.
rca of the issue: No blocking bug in Phase E. The only anomaly is i-fleece seed field Rounding='Unrounded (spread)' vs canonical 'Unrounded' → parity.rounding=fail. Root cause: legacy seed predates canonical lockdown (Phase B). Reproduction: GET /api/admin/phonemes/i-fleece/readiness → summary.fail=1, parity.rounding message: 'Contraddizione: feature Rounding = Unrounded (spread) ma canonical dice Unrounded'. Mitigation options: (a) update i-fleece seed to 'Unrounded' — simplest, one-line diff in phoneme_seed_data.py, (b) add a Phase B legacy patch in ensure_phoneme_seed similar to the Near-high→Near-close patch, (c) normalise parenthetical qualifiers in build_readiness_report parity comparison (lossy). Recommendation: (a) + (b) combo — fix the seed AND add an idempotent DB patch for existing installs. u-foot is the reference impl and is 100% clean end-to-end.
